editorial_note: APPROVE. All claims, quotes (Huang, Wang, Cousins, Yip), and specifics verified verbatim against committed source snapshots. The 75/22/31 DoF figures match the official NVIDIA/GlobeNewswire/PR Newswire releases; the bot correctly avoided the conflicting 25-DoF-per-hand keynote figure that appears only in TechFundingNews. Engadget-cited specs (120 Nm, 15Ah/3hr, Blackwell/128GB) are accurate and additionally corroborated by the primary releases. $29,900 correctly framed as the existing H2, not the new H2 Plus. Sole finding is an allowlist gap (techfundingnews.com), an infrastructure note, not a content correction.
